tunnels.name: I-10 Deck Park Tunnel (Papago Fwy)
tunnels.addr: I-10 under Margaret T. Hance Park
tunnels.notes: 2,887' long — 42nd longest vehicular tunnel in US. Technically 19 bridges side-by-side. Standard freeway clearance (no issue for passenger/RV).
